title: poa buckleyana var. elongata
intro: Poa buckleyana var. elongata, also known as Buckley's blue grass, is a perennial grass species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa buckleyana var. elongata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
